entry: User asked to add meta-level session phases. Added Harden, Document, Curate, Audit, Refactor, Improve. Success.
Created cyberpunk poster for birthday invitation

Simulated 10 everyday tasks. Built activity-based continuity: BRAIN recall searches activity.jsonl, BRAIN log accepts --files/--task, BRAIN snapshot includes recent activity. BRAIN reflect adds Active Reminders section.
Strengthened BRAIN reflect+USERINPUT dual-command loop across all reinforcement layers: brain_inject, for_agent.md, ecosystem.py, clipboard suffix, and reflect output

Strengthened weak links for dumb agents: (1) core-loop.mdc Cursor rule enforces BRAIN reflect+USERINPUT, (2) IDE detection for Cursor/VSCode/Windsurf, (3) agent-brain.mdc updated with full BRAIN CLI, (4) brain_inject.py reports detected IDE, (5) new gap: IDE-agnostic hook framework

Fixed 2 critical weak links: (1) Re-enabled userinput_enforce.py stop hook - the ultimate safety net for agents that forget USERINPUT, (2) Added early reminders at tool calls 5 and 8 in brain_remind.py - fills the 500-call gap for dumb agents

Designed user interaction model: README.md 'Using with AI IDEs' section — user just types tasks, system handles everything. Emergency bootstrap one-liner for lost agents. Updated For AI Agents section with BRAIN reflect as key entry point.

Documented Cursor IDE quirks: (1) block_until_ms too short for USERINPUT - now explicit in userinput-timeout.mdc + core-loop.mdc + hooks/for_agent.md, (2) Search fails with spaces in paths - already handled by file_search_fallback.py hook, (3) Context summarization drops injected context - brain_remind compensates, (4) Added 'IDE Awareness' self-check dimension to for_agent_reflection.md

Added strategic pivoting guidance: (1) for_agent_reflection.md 'Strategic Pivoting' self-check, (2) for_agent.md 'Pivot on repeated failure' behavior, (3) ecosystem.py PIVOT directive, (4) strategy-pivot.mdc Cursor rule with pivot patterns table

Added knowledge creation motivation chain: (1) BRAIN digest now outputs specific SKILLS create commands, (2) for_agent.md Key commands now includes SKILLS learn/create and TOOL --dev create, (3) for_agent_reflection.md 'Knowledge Creation' self-check dimension, (4) BRAIN reflect now shows 'Creation Opportunities' section with lesson cluster counts and suggested commands

Added for_agent_reflection.md scope hierarchy: (1) root reflection = system-level, tool reflection = tool-specific, (2) BRAIN reflect --tool <NAME> reads tool-level gaps, (3) for_agent.md documentation convention updated to mention three-doc pattern, (4) Decision rule in for_agent_reflection.md: 'affects all future agents?' → root; 'only this tool?' → tool dir

Designed and implemented pluggable brain architecture: (1) blueprint.json defines 3 tiers (working/knowledge/episodic) with configurable backends, (2) BrainBackend abstract interface in logic/brain/base.py, (3) FlatFileBrainBackend reference implementation, (4) blueprint.py loader with BACKEND_REGISTRY for adding new backends, (5) interface/brain.py public API, (6) Batch-copied for_agent_reflection.md to 79 directories (59 tools + 18 logic modules + 2 iCloud)

Implemented brain session management: (1) BrainSessionManager in logic/brain/session.py with create/switch/export/load/migrate/manifest, (2) BRAIN session CLI commands, (3) MANIFEST.md auto-generation with hierarchical summary (working/knowledge/episodic + file inventory), (4) blueprint.json v1.1 with sessions config, (5) Migrated flat brain to sessions/default/

Created brain types system: (1) runtime/brain/types/ with 3 types (clitools-20260316, claude-mem-20260316, rag-20260316), (2) BRAIN session types command, (3) BRAIN session create --type support, (4) Each type has blueprint.json + README.md + defaults/, (5) Updated root README.md with brain architecture section

Added tmp/ to project layout mini-map in for_agent.md and brain_inject.py CLI primer. Gap: context-free agent wouldn't know about tmp/ directory for temporary scripts without this mention in the bootstrap section.

Enhanced project layout mini-map with complete symmetric directory listing: added data/ (API keys, caches, gitignored), logs/ (debug output, gitignored), test/ (unit tests), report/ (reports), research/ (analysis docs). Updated brain_inject.py CLI primer. Added directory usage check to for_agent_reflection.md Brain Intelligence dimension.

Rewrote Baidu provider (qianfan->OpenAI-compat), added 5 ERNIE models, fixed Gemini validation, added tiktoken token counter, enhanced EXEC sandbox with workspace boundary detection, updated frontend model cards

Fixed Auto mechanism: (1) Banner now waits for first response token before switching from robot to model name, (2) FALLBACK_LIST reordered with non-thinking models first (ernie-speed-8k at 10K RPM first), (3) Created TITLE_LIST excluding thinking models with max_tokens=16, (4) Page reload no longer flickers Choosing... for completed sessions

Auto mechanism test: 12/12 decide OK avg=2.2s (was 14.7s), title avg=1.5s. Fixed rate_queue._load_limits bug: vendor prefix fuzzy match hit wrong model (glm_4_7 instead of glm_4_flash), loaded rpm=10 instead of 30. Now uses exact directory match.

Live Auto test: 12 rounds completed. Fixed decision prompt to prefer FAST models. Reordered PRIMARY_LIST: FAST free > THINKING free > FAST paid > THINKING paid. Results: avg TTFT 2.3s for fast models (was 35s+ with thinking). Math proof correctly picked thinking model (71.8s TTFT). Known issue: cross-session event contamination when concurrent sessions.

Fixed 3 critical Auto bugs: 1) model_confirmed now delays until actual content (text/reasoning/tool_calls) arrives, not just first ok chunk. 2) Cross-session event contamination fixed with thread-local session_id in ConversationManager._emit. 3) Frontend session_id filtering added to model_decision_start/end/proposed, model_confirmed, system_notice event handlers in live.html.

Rate queue gap analysis: RateQueueManager exists in rate_queue.py with full 429 backoff but is NOT wired into the actual call path (conversation.py → _resilient_stream → provider.stream bypasses it). Task #36 tracks integration. Added reflex arcs to for_agent_reflection.md for built-but-not-wired infrastructure pattern.

Session continuation: completed metacognitive repair expectation RAG arc (for_agent_reflection.md), rate queue gap analysis (built but not wired into call path, task #36), provider favicon onerror fallback to robot icon (engine.js), fixed duplicate qwen key in PROVIDER_LOGOS, added reflex arcs for infrastructure-not-wired pattern.

Fixed: (1) Diff blocks now auto-render via requestIdleCallback instead of requiring click-to-expand. (2) Baidu ERNIE HTTP 400 role alternation error fixed by adding STRICT_ALTERNATION message sanitization to OpenAICompatProvider - merges consecutive same-role messages. Applied to all Baidu and Tencent models.

Completed comprehensive user testing round 3: 10 tests, found and fixed 4 critical bugs (sandbox safe_read bypass, nudge system aggressiveness, edit_file syntax-check-but-write-anyway, system prompt over-emphasis on editing). Optimized system prompt to 50% size with task-type awareness.

Completed user feedback round: CSS spacing fix, Compression Trigger UI simplification, spinner-on-error/stop fix, edit_file policy reverted to allow-with-warning, workspace navigation design (PATH + env var + prompt injection).

Implemented TOOL eco: unified ecosystem navigation CLI. 10 subcommands (search, tool, skill, map, here, guide, recall, cmds, cmd, dashboard). Updated guidance (for_agent.md, ecosystem.py, guidelines, BRAIN reflect). Blueprint commands integration. Context-free onboarding verified.

Completed comprehensive sandbox overhaul: 5-layer sandbox system (base/mode/workspace-boundary/system/command), frontend countdown bar, Turing-format terminal notifications, settings panel with pagination and timeout, workspace-mounted session boundary protection. Tested with 5 live tasks via endpoint monitoring.
Also completed: TOOL --eco symmetric per-tool (ToolBase._handle_eco_command), forced --eco prefix, eco/ directory in tool template, batch documentation update across 6+ files.

CDMCP infrastructure upgrade: (1) interface/endpoint.py - symmetric --endpoint command framework with EndpointRegistry, (2) Cleaned welcome URL to session_id only with /api/session/<sid> backend API, (3) Added SSE /api/events + /api/event POST for real-time state sync (lock/unlock/navigate), (4) ThreadedServer for concurrent SSE+HTTP, (5) 20-test validation suite: 18/20 passed. SQLite deferred (JSON adequate for current scale).

Workspace integration: (1) _ensure_workspace() auto-provisions workspace when agent starts, (2) 7 workspace API endpoints (list/active/create/open/close/delete/state) added to assistant GUI, (3) Brain data scoped to workspace/<hash>/brain/, (4) --assistant --endpoint --workspace --state returns brain files + mounted dir listing, (5) SSE events pushed for workspace lifecycle (created/opened/closed/deleted), (6) Full integration test passed for tmp/ mount.

Auto stability tests: 5/5 PASS. Fixed nudge display (debug not text), thought_signature preservation for Google Gemini, nudge false-positive detection, system prompt stopping rules. Decision latency 4-7s avg, fallback working.
Completed code decomposition cleanup: removed shims, merged research/ into report/, consolidated duplicates, updated skills, fixed BRAIN import path

Major refactoring: Migrated logic/gui/, logic/translation/, logic/utils/ into logic/_/. Updated 384 imports across 146 files. logic/ now only contains _/ (shared infra) and command-named modules (brain/, git/, tool/). Added logic_structure audit phase. Formalized rule in symmetric-design skill.
Fixed USERINPUT bell sound path (4 files). Verified auto-commit works correctly - no work loss. Commit #0730 captured entire logic/ migration.
Test: verified runtime path migration to data/_/runtime/
Fixed BRAIN paths: all now point to canonical data/_/runtime/_/eco/brain/ and data/_/runtime/_/eco/experience/. Merged stale intermediate data.

Session work: (1) Completed entropy audit prototype+protocol+simulation+report. (2) Fixed bin/BRAIN paths: 10 references from runtime/ and data/_/runtime/brain/ to canonical data/_/runtime/_/eco/brain/ and data/_/runtime/_/eco/experience/. (3) Designed 3-tier command system (shared eco/hierarchical/decorator) in symmetric-design skill. (4) Added command_symmetry audit phase. (5) Added non-CLI content + data symmetry rules to skill. (6) Added Metacognitive Auditing section to meta-agent skill. (7) Researched OpenClaw brain mechanism.

Completed 3-tier argparse refactoring: bin/TOOL now uses --- prefix for all eco commands, help text updated, normalization supports both --- and -- for migration. Argparse audit refactored to distinguish Tier 1 (base) vs Tier 2 (tool-specific) contexts - 0 violations remaining. Decorator flags updated to -no-warning/-tool-quiet as first option string.

LESSON [critical]: Violated USERINPUT skill rules: (1) used block_until_ms:0 instead of 310000, (2) used tail to read terminal ANSI output instead of Read/cat. Both explicitly warned against in skill. Must internalize: USERINPUT is ALWAYS blocking with 310000ms minimum.

Completed 7 tasks: (1) Fixed USERINPUT skill violation (metacognitive lesson). (2) Removed backward compat from bin/TOOL and base.py — only --- for eco commands. (3) Added refactor_aggressiveness config (default=1). Fixed config path bug from migration. (4) Implemented unordered eco token dispatch — TOOL ---dev ---create = TOOL ---create ---dev. (5) Added TOOL ---audit argparse --fix with conformance check and directory structure auto-fix. (6) Updated symmetric-design and modularization skills with 3-tier convention and config reference. (7) Refreshed tool templates — all .tmpl files now use correct imports, --- prefix, modern structure. Fixed 2 template bugs (missing AGENT.md.tmpl, wrong _TEMPLATE_DIR depth).

Major architecture refactor: (1) Renamed 15 command.py→cli.py with batch script, updated 14 imports including __init__.py. (2) Abstracted base.py eco dispatch — replaced hardcoded handler dict with directory-based discovery via _resolve_eco_command(). logic/_/<name>/cli.py auto-discovered. (3) Refactored bin/TOOL — removed 50-line _module_map, now uses same directory discovery as base. (4) Added TOOL ---dev scaffold <tool> <path> — creates cli.py+README+AGENT at any depth. (5) Fixed config path bug (logic/_/config/main.py PROJECT_ROOT off by 1 parent). (6) Updated EcoCommand.create_parser to use --- prefix.

Documented main.py vs cli.py lifecycle distinction in symmetric-design skill, EcoCommand docstring, base.py docstring, and tool template. Key insight: base argparse is stateless — directory structure IS the routing state. main.py = start (invokes stateless router), cli.py = end (concrete handler). If main.py has business logic → decompose to cli.py.

Validated stateless main.py concept: root bin/TOOL minimized to 17 lines, 42/59 tool main.py files batch-minimized. All eco commands route through ToolBase directory-based discovery. Template updated. 17 complex tools remain for manual cli.py decomposition.
